data.title: What some of the largest online retailers are saying about U.S.-imposed tariffs
data.description: "Uncertainty" is the key word among retail executives at 11 of the largest 100 U.S. retailers. Some have factored the impact into their fiscal guidance for the rest of the year, while others have avoided doing so, unsure of what to even factor.

data.title: Distribution Solutions Group expands ecommerce
data.description: With its ecommerce platform set to launch, Distribution Solutions Group is positioning itself for long-term growth. It will leverage digital tools to drive efficiency, customer engagement, and sales, the company says.

data.title: RNDC names a new chief digital and information officer
data.description: In her new role, Emily Xu will focus on advancing automation in supply chain management, modernizing the company’s technology infrastructure, strengthening cybersecurity, and integrating data analytics to drive business decisions.

data.title: Walgreens going private in $23.7 billion acquisition deal
data.description: The deal also includes a "go-shop" period in which Walgreens has 35 days to evaluate and enter into negotiations with parties offering alternative proposals.

data.title: GrubMarket rolls out AI solution to navigate supply chain language
data.description: The dictionary assistance feature marks GrubMarkets latest use of AI in its operations for wholesalers and distributors.
